# The Cortex вЂ” Interrogator Interface

> A cinematic React application for interrogating an autonomous AI Agent mesh.
> Aesthetic: "Dark Glass & Neon" вЂ” deep slate backgrounds, translucent glass panels, electric blue/purple neon accents.

## Tech Stack

- Framework: React 18+ (Vite 7, TypeScript 5.9)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (dark mode default, custom @theme neon palette)
- Animation: Framer Motion (entrance animations, spring physics, typewriter effects)
- State: Zustand (single store for interview state)
- Icons: Lucide React
- Graph: @xyflow/react (React Flow v12) for node-based workflow visualization
- Fonts: JetBrains Mono (code/data), Inter (UI text)

## Architecture Overview

The app has three main phases, controlled by `InterviewPhase` in the Zustand store:

1. **active** вЂ” User chats with the mock agent via the Neural Stream. Ontology terms and data bindings accumulate in the HUD sidebar.
2. **blueprint** вЂ” After 4+ agent responses, the Neural Stream swaps to the Holographic Blueprint (React Flow canvas) showing a node graph of the generated workflow.
3. **compiling** в†’ **complete** вЂ” User clicks "Compile Workflow" triggering a full-screen matrix-style code scroll overlay, ending with a "System Online" success state.

## File Map

```
src/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ main.tsx                          # React entry point
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ App.tsx                           # Root component, phase-based view switching
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.css                         # Tailwind v4, @theme neon colors, glass utilities, keyframes
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ store/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ useInterviewStore.ts          # Zustand store: messages, phase, ontologyTerms, dataBindings
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ hooks/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useMockAgent.ts               # Simulates streaming agent responses, thinking phases, keyword detection
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ useMockWorkflowBuilder.ts     # Generates React Flow nodes/edges from interview state
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Layout.tsx                    # App shell: header + two-column layout (main + HUD sidebar)
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ NeuralStream/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ NeuralStream.tsx          # Scrollable message list with auto-scroll
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MessageBubble.tsx         # User/agent message rendering, typewriter cursor
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ThinkingCard.tsx          # Holographic card with ontology scan + DataHub query animations
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ InputBar.tsx              # Glowing neon input bar with gradient focus ring
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ HUD/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ HUD.tsx                   # Right sidebar: ontology map + data bindings + compile button
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ OntologyMap.tsx           # Extracted ontology terms as color-coded glowing tags
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ DataBindings.tsx          # dbt model list with green/red health status dots
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Blueprint/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ WorkflowCanvas.tsx        # React Flow instance with dark dot background, custom controls
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nodes/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ TriggerNode.tsx       # Circular pulse node (green) вЂ” input sources
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ LogicNode.tsx         # Diamond-shaped glow node (blue) вЂ” ontology checks
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ActionNode.tsx        # Rectangular node (purple) вЂ” services/actions, glitch on hover
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ edges/
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ AnimatedEdge.tsx      # Pulsing SVG gradient edge simulating data flow
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Compilation/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CompileButton.tsx         # Gradient-glow button, transitions to "System Online" badge
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ CompilationOverlay.tsx    # Full-screen matrix code scroll with progress bar
```

## Key Patterns

- **Glass panels**: Use `.glass-panel` or `.glass-panel-sm` CSS classes for translucent containers with backdrop blur.
- **Neon colors**: Available as Tailwind classes вЂ” `text-neon-blue`, `bg-neon-purple/20`, `border-neon-green/30`, etc. Defined in `@theme` block in index.css.
- **Animations**: Custom Tailwind animations вЂ” `animate-pulse-neon`, `animate-glow`, `animate-breathe`. Use Framer Motion for entrance/exit animations on components.
- **Custom node types**: React Flow nodes are registered as `trigger`, `logic`, `action` in WorkflowCanvas. Each accepts a `delay` data prop for sequential build-sequence animation.
- **Mock data**: No backend. `useMockAgent` detects keywords (engine, damage, schedule) to return themed responses. `useMockWorkflowBuilder` generates graph from accumulated store state.

## Zustand Store Shape

```
{
  messages: Message[]           // Chat history (user + agent)
  phase: InterviewPhase         // "active" | "blueprint" | "compiling" | "complete"
  ontologyTerms: OntologyTerm[] // Extracted concepts { category, label }
  dataBindings: DataBinding[]   // Identified dbt models { model, schema, healthy }
}
```

## Running

```bash
npm install
npm run dev          # http://localhost:5173
npm run build        # Production build
```
